hooks.command: echo 'Reminder: only capture lessons that would prevent a future agent from repeating a *specific* non-obvious mistake. Route them to an existing docs/<topic>.md, to CLAUDE.md (if it is a project-wide invariant), or create a new docs/<topic>.md when 2+ findings cluster on a topic. Never write to .claude/rules/lessons-learned.md (deprecated). If the session went smoothly, capture nothing.'
